title: Technical Architecture of HELM, DeepEval, and RAGAS
objective: Document the core architecture and 'hallucination' metrics for HELM, DeepEval, and RAGAS. Identify the specific algorithms used (e.g., Faithfulness, Answer Relevancy, Context Precision) and their implementation status as of Q1 2026. Prioritize official documentation and GitHub source code.

RAGAS metrics for RAG hallucination detection 2025 2026

title: Comparative Accuracy & Sensitivity Analysis
objective: Find recent (2025-2026) benchmark studies or ArXiv papers comparing the sensitivity of these frameworks in detecting ground-truth hallucinations. Extract F1 scores or Correlation with Human Judgment (Meta-evaluation) metrics.
search_hints: benchmark RAGAS vs DeepEval vs HELM accuracy
LLM-as-a-judge correlation with human judgment benchmarks 2026

title: Integration, Latency, and Cost-of-Run
objective: Research operational aspects including typical latency per evaluation run, token consumption costs (when using LLM-as-a-judge), and ease of CI/CD integration. Focus on developer experience and multi-modal support.
search_hints: HELM evaluation run cost estimate tokens
integrating RAGAS in GitHub Actions pipeline example
